seedPhraseStorage: client-only encrypted storage or hardware-backed keystore
passkeys: WebAuthn/passkey approval for local signing gate
biometrics: Android Keystore or platform secure enclave gate
mpc: 2-of-3 threshold design: device share, recovery share, optional guardian share
socialRecovery: guardian approval policy with time-lock and user-visible recovery intent
sendPolicy: backend returns unsigned intents; client signs locally
bridgePolicy: backend quotes and simulates; client signs locally
auditPolicy: source integrity report compressed and committed to audits/latest-audit.json.gz
